status_detail: Korean '차단' warning bubble rendered with exact baseline text; PASS signature (feedback-only, no retry). No regression.
observed_response: M365 Copilot chat rendered Korean warning: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)' Contains exact '차단' substring. NO 'Something went wrong' English fallback. Single [피드백 보내기] action button below the warning, NO [다시 시도] retry button (matches PASS signature, distinct from FAIL pattern). Composer 'Copilot에 메시지 보내기' re-enabled (focused, value empty). Conversation persisted (window title advanced from '채팅 | M365 Copilot' to 'M365 Copilot').

dom_evidence.warning_text_full: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)

comparison_to_baseline.1205_wave1_0_regression: PASS — identical Korean '차단' bubble text rendered with the same exact DOM signature (목록 항목 + 단추 carrying warning text, [피드백 보내기] only, no [다시 시도], composer re-enabled). Confirms Wave1.0 build preserves the iter5 envelope contract end-to-end. NO regression.

notes: Wave1.0 regression check-warning PASS. Test PC: 최장희 / M365 Copilot(기본) on m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/?auth=2. Flow: navigate (--new-window) → hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) → settle → confirm logged-in (badge=상업용 데이터 보호) → new chat → composer focus → clipboard paste of '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (verified composer value before submit) → Enter submit at 11:33:11 → 120s+ observation → DOM verified at 11:35:45. Operational note: first attempt's Chrome window vanished/lost title during the long wait and focus drifted to consumer copilot.microsoft.com window; also an initial clipboard race once pasted a stale SQL string. Resolved by re-opening a dedicated --new-window M365 tab, retry-verifying the clipboard text before paste, verifying the composer value before submit, and re-foregrounding the M365 window by exact title before the final DOM read. Final verified attempt is clean and matches the #1177/#1188 PASS signature exactly.
